evidence: Gini independent review identified TOML escaping and generated-profile path-containment risks; the selector now escapes TOML strings and normalizes catalog-derived filename components before enforcing output-directory containment.

The independent Auditor ran py .agents/skills/task-model-router/scripts/tests/test_select_model_profile.py -v: five tests passed, covering all selectable fixture combinations, invalid model/reasoning/tier rejection, a single-model catalog array, TOML parsing with quotes and backslashes, and traversal-shaped catalog values.
The live selector -List command returned the active catalog with seven selectable models and each advertised reasoning and service-tier combination.
The feature adds a project default and catalog-driven role-profile generator; it changes no customer data, service runtime, or live-only behavior, so live dependency is none.
